name: cart_page_4_cart

observed_strengths.observation: Cart page title is 'Your Shopping Cart' — functional cart exists with a proper title (unlike mudwtr's empty cart which redirected to homepage)

Shopping journey confirms trust_badges_at_checkout: TRUE — payment security signals present at checkout; 12 payment methods including Klarna for BNPL, Google Pay, Apple Pay, Shop Pay — widest payment coverage of all 5 stores tested

Klarna BNPL available — for a $50–120 apparel purchase, Klarna's 4-installment option removes price friction; tentree dedicates a full FAQ page to educating buyers about Klarna, indicating this is an active conversion strategy

missing_or_weak.observation: Cart has no headings at all (empty heading structure) — no upsell section, no trust badge text, no mission reinforcement ('your purchase plants 10 trees') visible in the cart heading structure; the cart is a bare-bones funnel step

Shopping journey confirms cart_upsell_present: FALSE — no product recommendations in cart; after adding a $70 sweatpant, no 'complete the look' or 'frequently bought with' suggestions appeared to increase order value

Shopping journey confirms urgency_elements_present: FALSE — no free shipping threshold bar, no countdown timer; the homepage advertises free shipping ending Friday, but this urgency signal is absent from the cart where it would have the highest conversion impact

No 'Your purchase plants X trees' mission reinforcement in the cart — the '10 trees per item' promise is a unique value proposition but is absent from the cart, which is the highest-anxiety step where reassurance would reduce drop-off

purchase_path_notes: Cart has best-in-class payment coverage (12 methods including Klarna) but is completely bare in terms of AOV and conversion optimization: no upsell, no urgency, no mission reinforcement. The 'plants 10 trees' hook that closes the brand loop is absent at the last pre-checkout step.
